docs.title: Cobblemon Ditto HMs
docs.text: Cobblemon Ditto HMs is a Minecraft 1.21.1 mod (Fabric & NeoForge) that brings Ditto's 30 Pokopia HM abilities into the Cobblemon experience.

docs.title: How it works
docs.text:
1. Find the right Pokémon in the wild — each ability is tied to a specific species.
  2. Sneak + right-click that Pokémon while holding the required trigger item.
  3. The Pokémon gives you an HM Disc with the ability's Pokopia art.
  4. Right-click the HM Disc to learn the ability permanently (it stays in your inventory as a usable badge).
  5. Use your HM Case (crafteable) to manage all learned abilities from a single hotbar slot.

docs.title: Quick links
docs.text: Getting Started First steps, crafting, and the HM Case Active HMs 24 abilities activated on right-click Toggle HMs 6 passive abilities that run continuously HM Case Manage all abilities from one item Configuration Per-ability hunger / cooldown / power sliders Commands Admin and player commands

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text: Loader Dependencies Fabric Fabric Loader ≥ 0.16.5, Fabric Language Kotlin, Cobblemon, Cloth Config NeoForge NeoForge 21.1+, KotlinForForge 5+, Cobblemon

docs.title: Changelog
docs.text: All notable changes are documented here. Format: Keep a Changelog + SemVer.

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
• 15 Pokopia-inspired Ditto HM abilities, each consuming hunger on use.
  • Abilities unlock by having the required Pokémon in your Cobblemon party.
  • /dittohms use <ability> — activate any unlocked ability.
  • /dittohms list — see all abilities with unlock status and cooldowns.
  • Per-ability cooldowns to prevent spam.
  • Multiloader: Fabric and NeoForge shipped as one Modrinth version.

docs.title: Abilities
docs.text: Ability Unlock Pokémon Effect Water Gun Squirtle Sprays water in + pattern; extinguishes nearby fire Leafage Bulbasaur Converts dirt→grass and bone-meals crops in area Cut Scyther Chops wood and leaf blocks in a 3-wide column ahead Rock Smash Hitmonchan Haste II for 10 s Rototiller Drilbur Tills soil in 3×3 area Jump Magikarp Jump Boost III for 15 s Surf Lapras Dolphin's Grace for 30 s Camouflage Zorua Invisibility for 30 s Stockpile Water Wooper Places water sources in radius around player Strength Machoke Strength II for 15 s Rollout Graveler Speed III + Haste II for 10 s Glide Dragonite Slow Falling for 60 s Waterfall Gyarados Levitation burst to climb waterfalls Magnet Rise Magnemite Levitation I for 30 s Dive Vaporeon Water Breathing + Dolphin's Grace for 60 s

docs.title: Player commands
docs.text:
All players can use these:

/dittohms use <ability>
Activates an ability you have learned (same as right-clicking its disc or using the HM Case).

/dittohms list
Displays all 30 abilities with your current learn status, toggle state, and configured hunger/cooldown.

/dittohms select <ability>
Sets the active ability in the HM Case that is currently in your hotbar.

docs.title: Operator commands
docs.text:
Require permission level 2 (operator):

/dittohms give <ability> <player>
Gives the HM Disc for the specified ability to a player.

/dittohms config <ability> hunger <0–20>
/dittohms config <ability> cooldown <0–24000>
/dittohms config <ability> power <0–512>
Adjusts an ability's tuning. Changes persist in config/cobblemon_ditto_hms.json.

/dittohms config <ability> reset
Resets a single ability to its default values.

/dittohms config reset_all
Resets every ability to defaults.

docs.title: Ability IDs
docs.text: ID Display name water_gun Water Gun leafage Leafage cut Cut rock_smash Rock Smash rototiller Rototiller jump Jump surf Surf camouflage Camouflage stockpile_water Stockpile Water strength Strength rollout Rollout glide Glide waterfall Waterfall magnet_rise Magnet Rise dive Dive flash Flash ember Ember bullet_seed Bullet Seed teleport Teleport fly Fly rain_dance Rain Dance sunny_day Sunny Day rock_climb Rock Climb rest Rest dig Dig explosion Explosion thunder Thunder string_shot String Shot defog Defog crab_hammer Crab Hammer

docs.title: Configuration
docs.text:
Every ability has three tunable values:

Parameter Description Hunger Food levels required and consumed per use (0 = free) Cooldown Ticks between uses (20 ticks = 1 second; 0 = no cooldown) Power Ability-specific: radius, duration, damage, count, etc.

docs.title: Cloth Config GUI (Fabric)
docs.text: Open Mod Menu → Cobblemon Ditto HMs → ⚙ to see sliders for every ability's three values. Changes save automatically.

docs.title: In-game commands
docs.text:
Operator-only (permission level 2):

/dittohms config <ability> hunger <0–20>
/dittohms config <ability> cooldown <0–24000>
/dittohms config <ability> power <0–512>
/dittohms config <ability> reset
/dittohms config reset_all

docs.title: Config file
docs.text:
The file is saved at:

  • Fabric: config/cobblemon_ditto_hms.json
  • NeoForge: config/cobblemon_ditto_hms.json

You can edit it directly — changes take effect on next server start.

docs.title: Default values
docs.text:
Ability Hunger Cooldown Power Water Gun 1 2s radius 3 Leafage 1 2s radius 5 Cut 2 none max 128 blocks Rock Smash 2 none max 32 ores Rototiller 1 none 1 block Camouflage 3 10s 30s duration Stockpile Water 2 3s 1 block Strength 2 none 1 block push Waterfall 2 6s 2s levitation Magnet Rise 3 8s 60s hover Ember 1 1s reach 5 blocks Bullet Seed 2 1s 5 seeds/burst Teleport 5 5s max 30 blocks Fly 3 none 60s flight Rain Dance 3 10s 5 min rain Sunny Day 3 10s 5 min clear Rock Climb 2 5s 15s effects Rest 0* 10 min — Dig 2 none Haste III Explosion 15 10s blast 4 Thunder 3 5s 3 bolts String Shot 1 2s radius 1 Defog 2 5s radius 10 Crab Hammer 3 2s — Jump (toggle) — — Jump Boost II Surf (toggle) — — Dolphin's Grace Glide (toggle) — — Slow Falling Rollout (toggle) — — Speed I Dive (toggle) — — Water Breathing Flash (toggle) — — Night Vision

* Rest sets hunger to 1 regardless of cost.

docs.title: Obtaining HM Discs
docs.text:
Each ability is locked behind a Pokémon interaction. To unlock one:

  1. Locate the required Pokémon in the world (or spawn it with /pokespawn <species>).
  2. Hold the trigger item in your main hand.
  3. Sneak + right-click the Pokémon.
  4. The trigger item is consumed and the Pokémon gives you the HM Disc.

Tip

You can get HM Discs as an operator with /dittohms give <player> <ability_id> without needing to interact with a Pokémon.

docs.title: Learning an ability
docs.text:
Once you have an HM Disc:

  • Right-click the disc → the ability is permanently learned and the disc stays in your inventory as a reusable badge.
  • Using the disc again activates the ability.
  • Learned abilities persist across deaths and world reloads (stored server-side).

docs.title: Crafting the HM Case
docs.text:
The HM Case lets you manage all learned abilities from a single hotbar slot.

Recipe (shapeless):

Ingredient Quantity Chest 1 Diamond 1 Red Apricorn 1 Yellow Apricorn 1 Green Apricorn 1 Blue Apricorn 1 Black Apricorn 1 White Apricorn 1 Pink Apricorn 1

docs.title: Using the HM Case
docs.text:
Action Result Right-click Uses the currently selected (active) HM Shift + right-click Opens the HM Case GUI

In the GUI you can:

  • See all 30 HMs (grey = not yet learned, coloured = learned)
  • Click an Active HM to set it as the quick-use ability
  • Click a Toggle HM to enable or disable it

See the HM Case guide for full details.

docs.title: The hunger system
docs.text:
• Active HMs cost hunger on use (configurable per ability).
  • Toggle HMs block your maximum hunger while enabled — each active toggle reduces your max food bar by 2 points. You still regenerate health at the cap via a slow Regeneration effect.
Active toggles Max hunger 0 20 / 20 1 18 / 20 2 16 / 20 3 14 / 20 4 12 / 20 5 10 / 20 6 8 / 20

docs.title: HM Case
docs.text: The HM Case is a crafteable item that consolidates all 30 learned HMs into a single hotbar slot. It replaces the need to hold individual HM Discs and provides a management GUI.

docs.title: Crafting
docs.text:
Shapeless recipe (9 ingredients):

  • 1× Chest
  • 1× Diamond
  • 1× each of all 7 Apricorn colours (Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, Black, White, Pink)

docs.title: Usage
docs.text:
Action Result Right-click Activates the currently selected active HM (no item cooldown — always usable) Shift + right-click Opens the HM Case GUI

The HM Case does not apply an item cooldown, so you can always open the GUI even when the active ability is cooling down.

docs.title: Active HMs section (rows 0–2)
docs.text:
• Grey glass pane — ability not yet learned. Tooltip shows which Pokémon to interact with and what item to hold.
  • Coloured disc — ability learned. Click to set as the active (quick-use) ability.
  • Glowing disc ✦ — currently selected active ability.

Clicking an already-selected ability deselects it.

docs.title: Gold separator
docs.text: Visually separates active HMs from toggle HMs.

docs.title: Toggle HMs section (row 3)
docs.text:
• Grey glass pane — not yet learned.
  • Green [ON] — toggle is enabled.
  • Red [OFF] — toggle is learned but disabled.

Click any toggle to flip its state.

docs.title: HM independence
docs.text: Learning an HM via the disc is completely independent of the HM Case. The Case is purely a management and quick-access tool — abilities are tracked per-player, not per-Case item. You can use multiple HM Cases or none at all.

docs.title: Active HMs
docs.text: Active HMs are used by right-clicking the HM Disc or by setting them as active in the HM Case. Each use costs hunger and starts a cooldown.

docs.title: Acquisition table
docs.text: HM Pokémon Trigger item Water Gun Squirtle Blue Dye Leafage Bulbasaur Dandelion Cut Scyther Stick Rock Smash Hitmonchan Flint Rototiller Drilbur Coarse Dirt Camouflage Zorua Ink Sac Stockpile Water Wooper Clay Ball Strength Machoke Iron Ingot Waterfall Gyarados Prismarine Shard Magnet Rise Magnemite Iron Nugget Ember Charmander Blaze Powder Bullet Seed Seedot Wheat Seeds Teleport Abra Ender Eye Fly Pidgeot Phantom Membrane Rain Dance Politoed Prismarine Crystals Sunny Day Torkoal Sunflower Rock Climb Rhydon Chain Rest Snorlax Apple Dig Diglett Diamond Shovel Explosion Voltorb TNT Thunder Pikachu Lightning Rod String Shot Caterpie String Defog Togekiss Glass Crab Hammer Kingler Mace

docs.title: Water Gun
docs.text:
Hunger: 1 · Cooldown: 2s · Power: radius 3

Fires in the direction you're looking:

  • Extinguishes fire blocks in a radius
  • Converts a Sponge into a Wet Sponge
  • Places a Water block on the aimed surface

docs.title: Leafage
docs.text:
Hunger: 1 · Cooldown: 2s · Power: radius 5

Fully grows all crop blocks (wheat, carrots, potatoes, beetroot, etc.) in a 5×5 area. Does not affect grass, saplings, or flowers — only CropBlock instances.

docs.title: Cut
docs.text:
Hunger: 2 · Cooldown: none · Power: max 128 blocks

Treecapitator using BFS:

  • Aim at a log → cuts all connected logs (and leaves attached to them)
  • Aim at a leaf → strips all connected leaves only

Drops match a Netherite Axe.

docs.title: Rock Smash
docs.text:
Hunger: 2 · Cooldown: none · Power: max 32 ores

Always grants Haste II for 10 s. If the aimed block is an ore, it vein-mines all connected ores of the same type (BFS). Any other pickaxe-minable block is broken immediately (1 block).

docs.title: Rototiller
docs.text:
Hunger: 1 · Cooldown: none

Tills the single dirt-type block you are aiming at into Farmland. Works on: Dirt, Grass Block, Coarse Dirt, Dirt Path.

docs.title: Camouflage
docs.text:
Hunger: 3 · Cooldown: 10s · Power: 600t (30s duration)

  • Aim at a block → spawns a BlockDisplay entity showing that block at your position (follows you every tick).
  • Aim at an entity → adjusts your scale to match the entity's size and copies its name tag.
  • No invisibility — you are visually disguised but physically present.

docs.title: Stockpile Water
docs.text:
Hunger: 2 · Cooldown: 3s

Places one Water source block on the surface you are aiming at.

docs.title: Strength
docs.text:
Hunger: 2 · Cooldown: none

Pushes the aimed block one block in your horizontal facing direction. Cannot move: fluids, blocks with inventories (chests, etc.).

docs.title: Waterfall
docs.text:
Hunger: 2 · Cooldown: 6s · Power: 40t (2s)

Must be used in water. Gives a burst of Levitation II + a strong upward impulse, propelling you up through waterfall columns.

docs.title: Magnet Rise
docs.text:
Hunger: 3 · Cooldown: 8s · Power: 1200t (60s)

Grants creative-mode flight for 60 seconds with:

  • Slow Falling — gentle, floaty descent
  • Resistance I — electromagnetic steel durability

Feels like hovering on a Magnezone.

docs.title: Ember
docs.text:
Hunger: 1 · Cooldown: 1s · Power: reach 5 blocks

Works exactly like Flint & Steel:

  • Places fire on the aimed block face
  • Primes TNT instantly
  • Sets entities in front of you on fire (5 s)

docs.title: Bullet Seed
docs.text:
Hunger: 2 · Cooldown: 1s · Power: 5 seeds per burst

Fires a rapid barrage of seed projectiles (one every 3 ticks ≈ 0.15 s). Consumes any item whose registry ID contains "seed" from your inventory. The firing direction is locked at the moment of activation.

docs.title: Teleport
docs.text:
Hunger: 5 · Cooldown: 5s · Power: max 30 blocks

Teleports you to the block you are looking at (up to 30 blocks away). Automatically finds the nearest safe landing position. Plays the Enderman teleport sound.

docs.title: Fly
docs.text:
Hunger: 3 · Cooldown: none · Power: 1200t (60s)

Grants creative-mode flight for 60 seconds with a Speed II boost while airborne. Feels like riding a Charizard or Pidgeot.

docs.title: Rain Dance
docs.text:
Hunger: 3 · Cooldown: 10s · Power: 6000t (5 min)

Activates rain on the overworld for 5 minutes.

docs.title: Sunny Day
docs.text:
Hunger: 3 · Cooldown: 10s · Power: 6000t (5 min)

Clears the weather to sunny for 5 minutes.

docs.title: Rock Climb
docs.text:
Hunger: 2 · Cooldown: 5s · Power: 300t (15s)

Applies for 15 seconds:

  • Jump Boost IV — can reach ~5 extra blocks per jump
  • Slow Falling — controlled descent
  • Speed II — reach ledges quickly

docs.title: Rest
docs.text:
Hunger: none required · Cooldown: 10 min

  • Restores full HP and clears all status effects
  • Leaves hunger at 1 (heavy cost)
  • Skips time: day → night, night → day

Multiplayer

In multiplayer, all online players must agree to rest within a 15-second window. Any player who hasn't used Rest yet will see a notification.

docs.title: Dig
docs.text:
Hunger: 2 · Cooldown: none · Power: Haste III

Grants Haste III for 15 s and instantly breaks the single shovel-minable block you are aiming at (dirt, sand, gravel, clay, etc.) with Netherite Shovel drops.

docs.title: Explosion
docs.text:
Hunger: 15 · Cooldown: 10s · Power: 4 (blast radius)

Creates a large explosion centered on your position. You survive at exactly 1 HP and are not knocked back. Everything around you is not so lucky.

docs.title: Thunder
docs.text:
Hunger: 3 · Cooldown: 5s · Power: 3 lightning bolts

Calls down 3 lightning bolts around your position, striking nearby enemies.

docs.title: String Shot
docs.text:
Hunger: 1 · Cooldown: 2s · Power: radius 1

Lays cobwebs in a 1-block radius around you (at foot and head level), slowing anyone who walks into them.

docs.title: Defog
docs.text:
Hunger: 2 · Cooldown: 5s · Power: radius 10

  • Clears weather → sunny
  • Removes fire and cobwebs in a radius
  • Dispels your negative status effects (Blindness, Weakness, Poison, Wither, Hunger, Slowness, Mining Fatigue, Bad Luck)

docs.title: Crab Hammer
docs.text:
Hunger: 3 · Cooldown: 2s

A heavy mace swing: deals ~8 hearts of damage and knocks back all enemies within 3 blocks in front of you.

docs.title: Toggle HMs
docs.text: Toggle HMs are passive abilities that stay active until you turn them off. Enable/disable them via the HM Case GUI (Shift + right-click) or with /dittohms use <id>.

docs.title: Hunger cost
docs.text:
Each enabled toggle permanently blocks 2 hunger points from your maximum food bar. At your effective cap you still recover health — a slow Regeneration I effect is applied automatically.

Active toggles Max hunger 0 20 / 20 1 18 / 20 2 16 / 20 3 14 / 20 4 12 / 20 5 10 / 20 6 (all) 8 / 20

docs.title: Acquisition table
docs.text: HM Pokémon Trigger item Jump Magikarp Cod Surf Lapras Kelp Glide Dragonite Feather Rollout Graveler Cobblestone Dive Vaporeon Nautilus Shell Flash Ampharos Glowstone Dust

docs.title: Jump
docs.text:
Toggle blocks: 2 hunger

Applies Jump Boost II continuously while active. Approximately doubles jump height — great for traversal.

docs.title: Surf
docs.text:
Toggle blocks: 2 hunger

While in water, applies Dolphin's Grace continuously, significantly increasing swim speed. Has no effect on land.

docs.title: Glide
docs.text:
Toggle blocks: 2 hunger

Applies Slow Falling continuously. You descend very slowly, and fall damage is eliminated. Combine with Fly for full aerial control.

docs.title: Rollout
docs.text:
Toggle blocks: 2 hunger

Applies Speed I continuously — always a slight movement boost.

docs.title: Dive
docs.text:
Toggle blocks: 2 hunger

Two permanent effects while active:

  • Water Breathing — never run out of air
  • Natural sinking — a gentle downward force is applied when underwater, countering the vanilla "bobbing up" behaviour

docs.title: Flash
docs.text:
Toggle blocks: 2 hunger

Grants Night Vision permanently (infinite duration, ambient effect — shows **:** with no countdown timer). Toggle off to remove it instantly.
